text: In the first image, I feel a sense of anticipation, mixed with a bit of unease—it is dark and silent, the sterile hallway and the glass doors reflecting loneliness and emptiness. Stepping into the next space, an exhibition labeled "R+D," my mood shifts to curiosity and wonder. The abstract wall design and glowing screens promise knowledge and innovation, inviting me to ponder the ways humans connect with technology. Being here makes me aware of both isolation and the promise of imaginative progress.
